title: Jazz on the Rooftop
description: Weekly Tuesday night jazz overlooking Midtown's skyline. Perfect for sophisticated date night — sip cocktails, enjoy live music, and take in stunning views. Great atmosphere for conversation.

title: Is This Going To Cause An Argument - Marcus & Angel
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE
description: Comedy duo Marcus and Angel bring hilarious relational comedy to City Winery's intimate venue. Perfect for couples — you'll laugh, relate, and maybe settle a few arguments together. Wine and food available.

title: Latin Vibes at Tago Life Center
description: Tropical Latin Night with salsa, bachata, and merengue. Great for couples who want to learn or show off dance moves. Sizzling rhythms, vibrant energy, and non-stop dancing. Beginner-friendly atmosphere.

title: Amplify Decatur Festival
description: 4-day festival debuting a new concert stage. Live music, local vendors, and community vibes. Perfect for a daytime date with evening concerts. Pet-friendly, great food trucks on site.

title: Morgan Jay: The Goofy Guy Tour at Fox Theatre
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Musician-comedian Morgan Jay brings his unique blend of humor and soulful performance to Atlanta's iconic Fox Theatre. Great date night for couples who love music and comedy. Historic venue, full bar.

title: AFRO BEAT & CARIBBEAN VIBES at Tago Life Center
description: Catch the rhythm and feel the heat — Tropical Vibes Night brings the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music! Dance together to soca, reggae, and Afrobeat hits. Electric atmosphere, perfect for couples.

title: Bert Kreischer: Permission to Party at Gas South Arena
location: Gas South Arena, 6400 Rice Lake Pkwy, Duluth
description: Comedy superstar Bert Kreischer brings his legendary party energy. Hilarious, high-energy standup perfect for couples who laugh together. Great date night for comedy fans. Big venue, full bar.

title: Jess Hilarious at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Powers Ferry Rd SE, Marietta
description: Rising comedy star Jess Hilarious delivers hilarious, relatable standup. Great couples night out — laugh together at one of Atlanta's best comedy clubs. Two-show nights on Saturday.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 855 8th St NW, Atlanta
description: Atlanta's top comedians in one showcase! Great low-key date night — intimate venue, cold drinks, non-stop laughs. Must be 21+. Doors at 7:30pm.

title: Marcia Wood Gallery Openings - Susan Ker-Seymer & George Long
description: Exclusive gallery opening featuring two artists. Elegant, intimate atmosphere perfect for art-loving couples. Wine served, great conversation-starter. Explore cutting-edge contemporary art together.

title: LINES OF PLAY - Group Art Exhibition (30+ Artists)
description: Group art exhibition in celebration of the World Cup featuring 30+ artists. Great cultural date night — explore incredible art, sip drinks, and meet local creatives. Vibrant opening night energy.

title: Farmer's mARTket
description: Weekly outdoor marketplace featuring local farmers and artisans. Great for couples who love exploring local food and handmade goods. Farm-fresh produce, artisan crafts, live music, and great people-watching.

title: Jess Hilarious at Helium Comedy Club (Late Show)
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Powers Ferry Rd SE, Marietta
description: Late-night comedy show with Jess Hilarious. Perfect for couples who want a full evening — dinner + laughs. The 9:30 show has an extra raunchy energy. Full bar, great bites.

title: Amplify Decatur Festival - Final Day
description: Final day of the 4-day Amplify Decatur Festival. Live music, food trucks, local vendors. Great casual Sunday date — grab food, find a spot on the grass, and enjoy local bands.

title: 2026 Atlanta Summer Farmers Market
description: Three-day farmers market in Grant Park featuring local produce, artisan goods, and food vendors. Great for couples who love fresh, local ingredients. Perfect for a Saturday morning stroll and picnic prep.

title: Love and Music - Atlanta!
description: Romantic piano concert immersion following a VIP cocktail hour. Perfect date night for couples — intimate setting, beautiful live music, and sophisticated atmosphere. Door opens at 7:30pm for the VIP cocktail hour.

title: Artful ATL
description: Creating and curating space and community for emerging artists, emerging collectors, and art enthusiasts. Great cultural date night — explore incredible art, enjoy the gallery atmosphere, and support Atlanta's creative community.

title: Queer Games: A Videogame Exhibition
description: A unique exhibition showcasing videogames as art — interactive, creative, and thought-provoking. Perfect playful date idea for couples who love gaming, design, or pop culture.

title: Steph Tolev at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Powers Ferry Rd SE, Marietta
description: Award-winning comedian Steph Tolev brings her bold, high-energy standup to Atlanta. Great couples' night out — drink, laugh, and enjoy the intimate club atmosphere.

title: Farmers Market at The Battery Atlanta
location: The Battery Atlanta, 755 Battery Ave SE
description: Sunday farmers market at The Battery Atlanta. Grab fresh produce, artisan goods, and support local vendors. Great add-on to a date at The Battery — grab food, stroll, people-watch.
